description.value: A mounted turret weapon. Uses SMG DVs.

Used as a replacement for fighting or ranged weapon skills, excluding evasion. Note that this uses REF as a base for reasons involving initiative - set REF of the mook first, then consider that number when considering the Martial skill.

information.notes:
6th Street technicals are generic trucks that have been upgraded with mounted gun emplacements and crude armor, turning them into light assault vehicles. Thanks to their armor and gun, they form a core component of most 6th Street assaults.

Functionally, they are a generic truck with the Armored Chassis, which has been extended to cover/replace the windows. The mounted turret provides half cover to the individual manning it; they do not suffer any penalties from firing the turret's weapon from that position.The individual manning it fires its weapon on their turn, but may use the martial skill associated with the turret in place of their own, if they wish.

When the mounted turret is fired, the shooter can take the suppressive fire action, in addition to making an attack.

Token and art by Mattew Reger - find him on Instagram at kingof.roses (link).
